physical.title: Physical Wellness
physical.subtitle: Invest in your health with programs designed to energize, strengthen, and sustain your lifestyle.

modalDetails.fullDescription: Your health is the foundation of everything you do. Our annual health checkup provides a complete overview of your physical wellbeing, featuring comprehensive blood panels, cardiovascular screenings, and personalized consultations with top-tier physicians. We believe in preventative care that keeps you performing at your best.
bulletPoints: Access Doctor on Call With Practo

benefits.title: Gym Membership
benefits.desc: Sponsored premium access to top fitness centers.

modalDetails.fullDescription: Access the best fitness facilities in your area. We subsidize memberships to premium gyms, boutique studios, and specialized fitness centers to ensure you have the equipment and environment needed to achieve your physical goals.
bulletPoints: Free Access to 5000+ cult & Fiternity centers across 30+ states

benefits.title: Nutrition Consultation
benefits.desc: Nutritious, affordable meals available at all Bengaluru offices.

modalDetails.fullDescription: Eat well at work. Enjoy hygienic, balanced, and delicious meals.

benefits.title: Sports Reimbursement
benefits.desc: Thrilling inter-team sports events across multiple games.

modalDetails.fullDescription: Get ready to compete, connect, and celebrate team spirit with Game On — our exciting inter-team sports initiative. Participate in action-packed tournaments across cricket, badminton, snooker, table tennis, and many more games designed to promote camaraderie, wellness, and friendly competition.

benefits.title: Empowering Women
benefits.desc: Supporting women’s health and well-being at the workplace.

modalDetails.fullDescription: We are committed to creating an inclusive and supportive workplace for women. Our initiative provides convenient and eco-friendly hygiene solutions in restrooms, along with a dedicated one-day women’s wellness leave to support health, comfort, and overall well-being.

mental.title: Mental Wellness
mental.subtitle: Prioritize your inner balance and emotional resilience.

modalDetails.fullDescription: Take care of your mind with completely confidential, fully covered therapy sessions. Connect with licensed psychologists, psychiatrists, and counselors either in-person or virtually to navigate life's challenges.

benefits.title: Harassment Free Workspace
benefits.desc: Promoting respect, safety, and dignity at work.

modalDetails.fullDescription: We are committed to maintaining a workplace where everyone feels safe, respected, and valued. Our policies, training, and support systems ensure a harassment-free environment for all employees.

benefits.title: Stress Management
benefits.desc: Practical techniques to manage workplace stress.

modalDetails.fullDescription: Learn how to build resilience and navigate high-pressure environments. Our stress management programs include cognitive behavioral techniques, time-management workshops, and biofeedback training.

benefits.title: Empowering Women & Supporting Families
benefits.desc: Inclusive programs for women’s growth and family care benefits.

modalDetails.fullDescription: We are dedicated to fostering gender equality and supporting families. Our initiatives empower women through career development and leadership opportunities, while family-focused benefits like on-site creche support make balancing work and home easier.
bulletPoints: ₹8000 Monthly childcare assistance until your child turns 6

modalDetails.fullDescription: We believe rest and personal time are essential to long-term success. Our comprehensive leave program supports employees through life’s important moments—whether it’s vacation, parental leave, medical needs, or personal time—so you can recharge and return at your best.
bulletPoints: 15 Days Priviledged Leave with up to 45 days of Carry-Over
1 Day to Celebrate Your Birthday with loved ones
15 Days of Paternity or Adoption Leave
Compensatory Off - Your Hard work Deserves Extra Time Off

modalDetails.fullDescription: We celebrate exceptional achievements by acknowledging and rewarding individuals and teams who go above and beyond. Our recognition programs are designed to motivate, inspire, and foster a culture of excellence across the organization.
bulletPoints: THANK Anyone @ FYERS - Every Thank You makes a difference

modalDetails.fullDescription: Recognize the moments that matter. We sponsor milestone celebrations for individual achievements, project launches, anniversaries, and major team wins—creating meaningful experiences that strengthen culture and boost morale.

financial.title: Financial Wellness
financial.subtitle: Build security, stability, and long-term prosperity.

modalDetails.fullDescription: Upgrade your commute with our corporate car lease program. Enjoy tax-efficient vehicle leasing options with no down payments, inclusive insurance, and comprehensive maintenance packages.
bulletPoints: Exclusive Car Lease Plans for Level 6 & Above

modalDetails.fullDescription: Secure your future today. We provide aggressive corporate matching on your retirement contributions, comprehensive pension planning, and access to personalized wealth accumulation strategies.

benefits.title: Refer a You
benefits.desc: Encouraging team referrals to grow our talent community.

modalDetails.fullDescription: Help us find great talent by referring people you know! Our Refer-a-You program rewards employees who bring in qualified candidates, strengthening our team with trusted connections and expanding our culture of success.

Grow your wealth with expert advice. Connect with fiduciary financial advisors to review your stock portfolio, real estate investments, and asset allocation strategy without the hefty management fees.

Life is unpredictable, but your financial stability doesn't have to be. We offer zero-interest emergency loans, salary advances, and disaster relief grants to help you weather sudden financial storms.

hero.title: Empowering Every
hero.subtitle: Designed to support every aspect of your life — physical, mental, and financial. Because true success begins with holistic wellbeing.

footer.title: Your Wellness,
footer.subtitle: We are committed to providing comprehensive support across all facets of your life, ensuring you thrive both personally and professionally.
